title: pelargonium suburbanum
intro: Pelargonium suburbanum, also known as the Cape Geranium or Barberton Daisy, is a plant species belonging to the geranium family, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and distinctive leaf shape. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, coughs, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium suburbanum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system and promote respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium suburbanum can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, sore throats, and other respiratory infections.
